text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Shakur has just finished today's training.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Nope. This isn't gonna cut it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You head home. I'm gonna keep going.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur seems dissatisfied with something
about her performance, so it looks like she
intends to do additional training.
choice_data_list:
You're going to push yourself too hard if you
keep going.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Suit yourself. Just don't get in my way.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Good evening, Shakur. Trainer. Are you still
training?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: If so, why don't we run together?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why do I have to run with you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Weeell... ♪ I've brought my lap times down
recently. Don't you want to get some data?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Run with me, and you might just see something
you like. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, aren't you confident? ...If it's just talk, I'm
outta here.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And if I'm telling the truth, you'll run with me?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Actions speak louder than words. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Air Shakur does extra training until the
sun goes down.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? If I'm just doing what's necessary, I don't
think you can call it pushing myself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you want to talk general theory, let's stick to
the textbooks. Or did you have an original idea
you wanted to add?
choice_data_list: There are things you can do besides running.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah? Like what?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, if it isn't Shakur—just the person I need.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Just what I need, another pain in my ass. What do
you need me specifically for?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, you see, I need to gain an objective
understanding of my own running in order to
make progress with my research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If you're finished with your own training, could I
bother you to record mine?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Heh... So basically, you really wanna run right
now.
choice_data_list:
There are things to be learned through
observation.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You think I don't know that? Aren't I the one
always collecting data?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to stay put and watch her run. It seems
best to focus on data collection right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than push herself too hard at this point,
Air Shakur takes up a less strenuous activity.
